name: particle_wave_blue
title: Abstract blue particle wave motion background, flowing digital technology animation with copy space for text
keywords: motion background, abstract background, animation, video background, technology, particles, blue, wave, digital, copy space, backdrop, flow, futuristic, data, corporate, presentation, glow, cyberspace, modern, screensaver
positive: A wide cinematic abstract motion background filling the frame: countless tiny glowing blue and teal light particles stream slowly and continuously from left to right across a deep navy blue void, forming soft undulating waves that rise and fall like a calm luminous ocean. The particle waves ripple and drift smoothly without pause, individual points of light gently pulsing brighter and dimmer as they travel. Soft depth of field makes distant particles melt into a velvety dark gradient. The lower third of the frame remains a smooth featureless expanse of deep navy, completely plain and empty. Static locked-off camera, smooth constant motion, elegant premium technology aesthetic.

name: network_violet_drift
title: Purple glowing network connections motion background, abstract technology animation with copy space for text
keywords: motion background, abstract background, technology, animation, network, video background, purple, violet, connection, copy space, backdrop, digital, futuristic, corporate, presentation, glow, gradient, lines, communication, modern
positive: A wide cinematic abstract motion background: a delicate luminous network of thin violet and magenta light filaments connected by small glowing nodes floats on the right half of the frame over a smooth dark purple to near-black gradient backdrop. The web of lines drifts slowly and continuously upward and sideways, nodes gently pulsing with soft light, filaments subtly bending and reconnecting in fluid constant motion that never stops. The left half of the frame remains a smooth featureless dark purple gradient, completely plain and empty. Static locked-off camera, seamless calm ambient movement, elegant premium technology aesthetic.
